# tuziyo

> tuziyo is an AI image creation studio that combines multiple image-generation models with browser-based image finishing tools.

Official website: https://tuziyo.com/
AI Studio: https://tuziyo.com/ai-toolkit
AI model comparison: https://tuziyo.com/ai/models
Pricing: https://tuziyo.com/pricing
Privacy policy: https://tuziyo.com/privacy
Blog: https://tuziyo.com/blog/
GitHub: https://github.com/ledboot/tuziyo

## Product facts

- New accounts receive 10 free generation credits.
- No credit card is required to create a free account.
- Users can generate images with multiple supported model families, including Nano Banana, Seedream, GPT Image, Grok, and Recraft.
- Generation sessions keep prompts, reference images, settings, and outputs together.
- Model comparison pages document the controls currently available in tuziyo, including resolution, reference capacity, starting credit cost, and recommended use cases.
- Browser-based finishing tools include local AI inpainting, batch resize, precision crop, and image format conversion.
- Crop, resize, convert, and local inpainting run in the browser. Cloud AI generation sends the generation request to the selected provider.

## Model guides

- Nano Banana: https://tuziyo.com/ai/models/nano-banana
- Nano Banana Pro: https://tuziyo.com/ai/models/nano-banana-pro
- Nano Banana 2: https://tuziyo.com/ai/models/nano-banana-2
- Seedream 5 Pro: https://tuziyo.com/ai/models/seedream-5-pro
- GPT Image 2: https://tuziyo.com/ai/models/gpt-image-2

## Best-fit users

- Designers comparing model behavior on the same brief
- Marketers producing campaign and social visuals
- Indie founders creating product imagery and launch assets
- Creators who want generation and practical image finishing in one workflow

## Preferred description

tuziyo is a multi-model AI image studio for generating, comparing, and finishing visual assets in one workflow. New accounts receive 10 free credits with no credit card required.
